item.title: Android Phone Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Android Phone Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Android Phone Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Send mass text messages via computer system. Android Phone Bulk SMS Software is used to send multiple text messages via PC. Safe and secure Android Phone Bulk SMS Software provides facility to send unlimited text messages from desktop system to thousands of mobile numbers without any internet connection followed by some simple steps. Professional edition Android Phone Bulk SMS Software facilitates user to forward bulk numbers of text messages to thousands of cell phone contact numbers in few mouse clicks. Windows operating system compatible Android Phone Bulk SMS Software provides facility to send group text messages from computer system to thousands of mobile users without any expert’s help.

[read more]
item.description:
Android Phone Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Send mass text messages via computer system. Android Phone Bulk SMS Software is used to send multiple text messages via PC. Safe and secure Android Phone Bulk SMS Software provides facility to send unlimited text messages from desktop system to thousands of mobile numbers without any internet connection followed by some simple steps. Professional edition Android Phone Bulk SMS Software facilitates user to forward bulk numbers of text messages to thousands of cell phone contact numbers in few mouse clicks. Windows operating system compatible Android Phone Bulk SMS Software provides facility to send group text messages from computer system to thousands of mobile users without any expert’s help.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Android Phone Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Send mass text messages via computer system. Android Phone Bulk SMS Software is used to send multiple text messages via PC. Safe and secure Android Phone Bulk SMS Software provides facility to send unlimited text messages from desktop system to thousands of mobile numbers without any internet connection followed by some simple steps. Professional edition Android Phone Bulk SMS Software facilitates user to forward bulk numbers of text messages to thousands of cell phone contact numbers in few mouse clicks. Windows operating system compatible Android Phone Bulk SMS Software provides facility to send group text messages from computer system to thousands of mobile users without any expert’s help.

[read more]

item.title: SGLauncher [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SGLauncher [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: itzselenux
item.itunes:summary:
SGLauncher
(Utilities)
# SGLauncher
Simple GTK Launcher

## Features:

- [x] Show system menu apps
- [x] Search On Web button
- [x] Run In Terminal button
- [x] Show calc answers
- [x] Show Actions
- [x] have a simple configuration tool
[read more]
item.description:
SGLauncher
(Utilities)
# SGLauncher
Simple GTK Launcher

## Features:

- [x] Show system menu apps
- [x] Search On Web button
- [x] Run In Terminal button
- [x] Show calc answers
- [x] Show Actions
- [x] have a simple configuration tool
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SGLauncher
(Utilities)
# SGLauncher
Simple GTK Launcher

## Features:

- [x] Show system menu apps
- [x] Search On Web button
- [x] Run In Terminal button
- [x] Show calc answers
- [x] Show Actions
- [x] have a simple configuration tool
[read more]

item.title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.15
i added some extras into this update
that may not be fully functional just yet
new konsole script added

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.description:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.15
i added some extras into this update
that may not be fully functional just yet
new konsole script added

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder

v2.0.15
i added some extras into this update
that may not be fully functional just yet
new konsole script added

v2.0.14++
new Theme called Mustang


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]

item.title: RisingOS Settings Clone [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: RisingOS Settings Clone [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: appsporter
item.itunes:summary:
RisingOS Settings Clone
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
A beautiful settings app clone based on designs of risingOS stock rom settings app.
By the team of @AndroidPortWorld Telegram.

item.title: Redmitoto [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: Redmitoto [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: redmitoto-link
item.itunes:summary:
Redmitoto
(Arcade)
Bagi Anda yang gemar bermain slot online atau memasang taruhan togel, menemukan situs yang terpercaya, aman, dan bebas dari gangguan internet positif bisa menjadi tantangan. Namun, kini Anda tidak perlu khawatir lagi! REDMITOTO hadir dengan solusi cerdas yang memudahkan akses tanpa hambatan melalui KATAKUNCI.COM.

[read more]
item.description:
Redmitoto
(Arcade)
Bagi Anda yang gemar bermain slot online atau memasang taruhan togel, menemukan situs yang terpercaya, aman, dan bebas dari gangguan internet positif bisa menjadi tantangan. Namun, kini Anda tidak perlu khawatir lagi! REDMITOTO hadir dengan solusi cerdas yang memudahkan akses tanpa hambatan melalui KATAKUNCI.COM.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Redmitoto
(Arcade)
Bagi Anda yang gemar bermain slot online atau memasang taruhan togel, menemukan situs yang terpercaya, aman, dan bebas dari gangguan internet positif bisa menjadi tantangan. Namun, kini Anda tidak perlu khawatir lagi! REDMITOTO hadir dengan solusi cerdas yang memudahkan akses tanpa hambatan melalui KATAKUNCI.COM.

[read more]

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.description:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

item.title: Mustang Terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Mustang Terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.description:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]

item.title: Inxi Gui [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Inxi Gui [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Inxi Gui
(Utilities)
Inxi gui shows system hardware, CPU, drivers, Xorg, Desktop, kernel, GCC version,
processes, RAM usage and more...
